device_name: Huxley SANSA Home Sleep Apnea Test (1000-00)
intended_use: The Huxley Home Sleep Apnea Test (SANSA) is a wearable device intended for use in the recording, analysis, and storage of biophysical parameters to aid in the evaluation of sleep-related breathing dis
intended_use_full: The Huxley Home Sleep Apnea Test (SANSA) is a wearable device intended for use in the recording, analysis, and storage of biophysical parameters to aid in the evaluation of sleep-related breathing disorders of adults suspected of sleep apnea. The device is intended for the clinical and home use setting under the direction of a Healthcare Professional (HCP).
target_condition: sleep-related breathing disorders, obstructive sleep apnea (OSA)
other_metrics: SpO2 ARMS (Average Root Mean Square error): 2.4% (overall, range 70-100% saturation); Heart Rate accuracy: ±3 bpm (range 30-250 bpm); Sleep/Wake classification - Sensitivity (Sleep): 95%, Specificity (Sleep): 63%
